title: Fails to parse edge sensitive path in specify

features.name: edge_sensitive_path_with_expression_dest
features.description: Code should include a specify block with an edge-sensitive path where the destination is an expression using bit-range select (+:) rather than a simple signal

features.name: parallel_case_path_with_expression_dest
features.description: Code should include a specify block with an edge-sensitive path using the parallel operator (*>) where the destination is an expression with bit-range select
